summary: Full backend + frontend smoke and integration testing of Deshna Canvassing premium 3D site. All 6 pytest cases passed (root health, contact create full + minimum, invalid-email 422, missing-required 422, list contacts with no _id leak). Frontend Playwright run covered: cinematic loader visibility, skip-intro button, navbar nav links, hero, highlights (4 stats), all 6 product cards, story quote, founder name, phone links (both numbers), WhatsApp deep link (https://wa.me/919901112555 with prefilled text), address lines, contact form POST to /api/contact with success toast 'Message received', and smooth-scroll nav. End-to-end integration (frontend form -> backend Mongo persistence) verified.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown') (FastAPI lifespan handlers are preferred in 2026).
POST /api/contact returns 200 instead of 201 Created on resource creation — minor REST correctness.
Cinematic loader auto-completion totals ~6.5s (3200ms falling + 3200ms reveal + 900ms fade); skip-intro works fine so impact is low, but consider trimming for slower devices.

Hero tagline split across spans ('Building Trust', italic 'Through', 'Distribution.') — fine visually but breaks single-text-node selector matching; consider aria-label on container for a11y/testability.
GET /api/contact returns up to 500 docs without pagination — fine for now but add limit/skip query params before production volume.
seed_data_creation: Test contact submissions prefixed with TEST_ inserted into Mongo (collection: contact_inquiries). Not cleaned up; recommend periodic prune.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL is REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. Backend prefix /api. Click [data-testid=skip-intro-btn] to bypass loader (~600ms fade). Form testid IDs: field-name/email/phone/company/message, contact-submit. Phone testids include the number e.g. contact-phone-9901112555. WhatsApp btn: contact-whatsapp-btn. No auth required.
